_comment: Price/volume factor weighting profiles (H2). JSON (not YAML) for the 3-level nesting, consistent with growth_policy.json. Weight keys are factor names from features/factors_price.py FACTORS. A POSITIVE weight = higher raw value is better; a NEGATIVE weight = lower raw value is better (e.g. realized_vol, amihud illiquidity). factor_alpha aggregates cross-sectional rank-normalized factor values weighted by |weight|, coverage-normalized. Adding a factor = register it in factors_price.py + add one weight line here.
